components.name: Upload
components.whenToUse:
Uploading is the process of publishing information (web pages, text, pictures, video, etc.) to a remote server via a web page or upload tool.

- When you need to upload one or more files.
- When you need to show the process of uploading.
- When you need to upload files by dragging and dropping.
components.whenToUseZh:
上传是将信息（网页、文字、图片、视频等）通过网页或者上传工具发布到远程服务器上的过程。

- 当需要上传一个或一些文件时。
- 当需要展现上传的进度时。
- 当需要使用拖拽交互时。

props.name: accept
props.description: File types that can be accepted. See [input accept Attribute](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/input/file#accept)
props.descriptionZh: 接受上传的文件类型, 详见 [input accept Attribute](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/input/file#accept)

props.name: beforeUpload
props.description: Hook function which will be executed before uploading. Uploading will be stopped with `false` or a rejected Promise returned. When returned value is `Upload.LIST_IGNORE`, the list of files that have been uploaded will ignore it. **Warning：this function is not supported in IE9**
props.descriptionZh: 上传文件之前的钩子，参数为上传的文件，若返回 `false` 则停止上传。支持返回一个 Promise 对象，Promise 对象 reject 时则停止上传，resolve 时开始上传（ resolve 传入 `File` 或 `Blob` 对象则上传 resolve 传入对象）；也可以返回 `Upload.LIST_IGNORE`，此时列表中将不展示此文件。 **注意：IE9 不支持该方法**

props.name: customRequest
props.description: Override for the default xhr behavior allowing for additional customization and ability to implement your own XMLHttpRequest
props.descriptionZh: 通过覆盖默认的上传行为，可以自定义自己的上传实现

props.name: data
props.description: Uploading extra params or function which can return uploading extra params
props.descriptionZh: 上传所需额外参数或返回上传额外参数的方法

props.name: defaultFileList
props.description: Default list of files that have been uploaded
props.descriptionZh: 默认已经上传的文件列表

props.name: fileList
props.description: List of files that have been uploaded (controlled). Here is a common issue [#2423](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/issues/2423) when using it
props.descriptionZh: 已经上传的文件列表（受控），使用此参数时，如果遇到 `onChange` 只调用一次的问题，请参考 [#2423](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/issues/2423)

props.name: headers
props.description: Set request headers, valid above IE10
props.descriptionZh: 设置上传的请求头部，IE10 以上有效

props.name: isImageUrl
props.descriptionZh: 自定义缩略图是否使用 <img /> 标签进行显示

props.name: itemRender
props.type: (originNode: ReactElement, file: UploadFile, fileList: object\[], actions: { download: function, preview: function, remove: function }) => React.ReactNode

props.name: listType
props.description: Built-in stylesheets, support for four types: `text`, `picture`, `picture-card` or `picture-circle`
props.descriptionZh: 上传列表的内建样式，支持四种基本样式 `text`, `picture`, `picture-card` 和 `picture-circle`

props.name: maxCount
props.description: Limit the number of uploaded files. Will replace current one when `maxCount` is `1`
props.descriptionZh: 限制上传数量。当为 1 时，始终用最新上传的文件代替当前文件

props.name: method
props.description: The http method of upload request

props.name: multiple
props.description: Whether to support selected multiple file. `IE10+` supported. You can select multiple files with CTRL holding down while multiple is set to be true
props.descriptionZh: 是否支持多选文件，`ie10+` 支持。开启后按住 ctrl 可选择多个文件

props.name: showUploadList
props.default: { showPreviewIcon?: boolean, showDownloadIcon?: boolean, showRemoveIcon?: boolean, previewIcon?: ReactNode \
props.description: Whether to show default upload list, could be an object to specify `showPreviewIcon`, `showRemoveIcon`, `showDownloadIcon`, `removeIcon` and `downloadIcon` individually
props.descriptionZh: 是否展示文件列表, 可设为一个对象，用于单独设定 `showPreviewIcon`, `showRemoveIcon`, `showDownloadIcon`, `removeIcon` 和 `downloadIcon`

props.name: withCredentials
props.description: The ajax upload with cookie sent
props.descriptionZh: 上传请求时是否携带 cookie

props.name: onChange
props.description: A callback function, can be executed when uploading state is changing, see [onChange](#onchange)
props.descriptionZh: 上传文件改变时的回调，详见 [onChange](#onchange)

props.name: onDrop
props.description: A callback function executed when files are dragged and dropped into upload area
props.descriptionZh: 当文件被拖入上传区域时执行的回调功能

props.name: onDownload
props.description: Click the method to download the file, pass the method to perform the method logic, do not pass the default jump to the new TAB
props.descriptionZh: 点击下载文件时的回调，如果没有指定，则默认跳转到文件 url 对应的标签页

props.name: onPreview
props.description: A callback function, will be executed when file link or preview icon is clicked
props.descriptionZh: 点击文件链接或预览图标时的回调

props.name: onRemove
props.description: A callback function, will be executed when removing file button is clicked, remove event will be prevented when return value is false or a Promise which resolve(false) or reject
props.descriptionZh: 点击移除文件时的回调，返回值为 false 时不移除。支持返回一个 Promise 对象，Promise 对象 resolve(false) 或 reject 时不移除

props.name: status
props.description: Upload status. Show different style when configured
props.descriptionZh: 上传状态，不同状态展示颜色也会有所不同

props.name: uid
props.description: unique id. Will auto generate when not provided
props.descriptionZh: 唯一标识符，不设置时会自动生成

demos.name: avatar
demos.title: Avatar
demos.description: Click to upload user's avatar, and validate size and format of picture with `beforeUpload`.
demos.descriptionZh:
点击上传用户头像，并使用 `beforeUpload` 限制用户上传的图片格式和大小。

> `beforeUpload` 的返回值可以是一个 Promise 以支持异步处理，如服务端校验等：[示例](https://upload-react-component.vercel.app/demo/before-upload#beforeupload)。

demos.name: basic
demos.title: Upload by clicking
demos.description: Classic mode. File selection dialog pops up when upload button is clicked.
demos.descriptionZh: 经典款式，用户点击按钮弹出文件选择框。

demos.name: crop-image
demos.title: Crop image before uploading
demos.description: Use [antd-img-crop](https://github.com/nanxiaobei/antd-img-crop) to crop image before uploading.
demos.descriptionZh: 配合 [antd-img-crop](https://github.com/nanxiaobei/antd-img-crop) 实现上传前裁切图片。

demos.name: customize-progress-bar
demos.title: Customize Progress Bar
demos.description: Use `progress` for customize progress bar.
demos.descriptionZh: 使用 `progress` 属性自定义进度条样式。

demos.name: defaultFileList
demos.title: Default Files
demos.description: Use `defaultFileList` for uploaded files when page init.
demos.descriptionZh: 使用 `defaultFileList` 设置已上传的内容。

demos.name: directory
demos.title: Upload directory
demos.description: You can select and upload a whole directory.
demos.descriptionZh: 支持上传一个文件夹里的所有文件。

demos.name: drag-sorting
demos.title: Drag sorting of uploadList
demos.description: By using `itemRender`, we can integrate upload with [dnd-kit](https://github.com/clauderic/dnd-kit) to implement drag sorting of uploadList.
demos.descriptionZh: 使用 `itemRender` ，我们可以集成 [dnd-kit](https://github.com/clauderic/dnd-kit) 来实现对上传列表拖拽排序。

demos.name: drag
demos.title: Drag and Drop
demos.description: You can drag files to a specific area, to upload. Alternatively, you can also upload by selecting.
demos.descriptionZh:
把文件拖入指定区域，完成上传，同样支持点击上传。

设置 `multiple` 后，在 `IE10+` 可以一次上传多个文件。

demos.name: fileList
demos.title: Complete control over file list
demos.description: You can gain full control over filelist by configuring `fileList`. You can accomplish all kinds of customized functions. The following shows two circumstances:
demos.descriptionZh:
使用 `fileList` 对列表进行完全控制，可以实现各种自定义功能，以下演示二种情况：

1. 上传列表数量的限制。

2. 读取远程路径并显示链接。

demos.name: max-count
demos.title: Max Count
demos.description: Limit files with `maxCount`. Will replace current one when `maxCount` is `1`.
demos.descriptionZh: 通过 `maxCount` 限制上传数量。当为 `1` 时，始终用最新上传的代替当前。

demos.name: picture-card
demos.title: Pictures Wall
demos.description: After users upload picture, the thumbnail will be shown in list. The upload button will disappear when count meets limitation.
demos.descriptionZh: 用户可以上传图片并在列表中显示缩略图。当上传照片数到达限制后，上传按钮消失。

demos.name: picture-circle
demos.title: Pictures with picture-circle type
demos.description: Alternative display for picture-card.
demos.descriptionZh: 图片卡的替代显示。

demos.name: picture-style
demos.title: Pictures with list style
demos.description: If uploaded file is a picture, the thumbnail can be shown. `IE8/9` do not support local thumbnail show. Please use `thumbUrl` instead.
demos.descriptionZh: 上传文件为图片，可展示本地缩略图。`IE8/9` 不支持浏览器本地缩略图展示（[Ref](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/FileReader/readAsDataURL)），可以写 `thumbUrl` 属性来代替。

demos.name: preview-file
demos.title: Customize preview file
demos.description: Customize local preview. Can handle with non-image format files such as video.
demos.descriptionZh: 自定义本地预览，用于处理非图片格式文件（例如视频文件）。

demos.name: transform-file
demos.title: Transform file before request
demos.description: Use `beforeUpload` for transform file before request such as add a watermark.
demos.descriptionZh: 使用 `beforeUpload` 转换上传的文件（例如添加水印）。

demos.name: upload-custom-action-icon
demos.title: custom action icon
demos.description: Use `showUploadList` for custom action icons of files.
demos.descriptionZh: 使用 `showUploadList` 设置列表交互图标。

demos.name: upload-manually
demos.title: Upload manually
demos.description: Upload files manually after `beforeUpload` returns `false`.
demos.descriptionZh: `beforeUpload` 返回 `false` 后，手动上传文件。

demos.name: upload-png-only
demos.title: Upload png file only
demos.description: `beforeUpload` only prevent upload behavior when return false or reject promise, the prevented file would still show in file list. Here is the example you can keep prevented files out of list by return `UPLOAD.LIST_IGNORE`.
demos.descriptionZh: `beforeUpload` 返回 `false` 或 `Promise.reject` 时，只用于拦截上传行为，不会阻止文件进入上传列表（[原因](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/issues/15561#issuecomment-475108235)）。如果需要阻止列表展现，可以通过返回 `Upload.LIST_IGNORE` 实现。

demos.name: upload-with-aliyun-oss
demos.title: Aliyun OSS
demos.description: Use Aliyun OSS upload example.
demos.descriptionZh: 使用阿里云 OSS 上传示例.

tokens.name: pictureCardSize
tokens.description: Size of list items in card type (affects both picture-card and picture-circle)
tokens.descriptionZh: 卡片类型文件列表项的尺寸（对 picture-card 和 picture-circle 生效）

faq.question: How do I implement upload server side?
faq.answer:
- You can consult [jQuery-File-Upload](https://github.com/blueimp/jQuery-File-Upload/wiki#server-side) about how to implement server side upload interface.
- There is a mock example of [express](https://github.com/react-component/upload/blob/master/server.js) in rc-upload.

faq.question: I want to display download links.
faq.answer: Please set property `url` of each item in `fileList` to control content of link.

faq.question: How to use `customRequest`?
faq.answer: See <https://github.com/react-component/upload#customrequest>.

faq.question: Why will the `fileList` that's in control not trigger `onChange` `status` update when the file is not in the list?
faq.answer: `onChange` will only trigger when the file is in the list, it will ignore any events removed from the list. Please note that there does exist a bug which makes an event still trigger even when the file is not in the list before `4.13.0`.

faq.question: Why does `onChange` sometimes return File object and other times return { originFileObj: File }?
faq.answer: For compatible case, we return File object when `beforeUpload` return `false`. It will merge to `{ originFileObj: File }` in next major version. Current version is compatible to get origin file by `info.file.originFileObj`. You can change this before major release.

faq.question: Why sometime Chrome can not upload?
faq.answer:
Chrome update will also break native upload. Please restart chrome to finish the upload work. Ref:

- [#32672](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/issues/32672)
- [#32913](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/issues/32913)
- [#33988](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/issues/33988)

components.doc: Upload file by selecting or dragging. ## When To Use Uploading is the process of publishing information (web pages, text, pictures, video, etc.) to a remote server via a web page or upload tool. - When you need to upload one or more files. - When you need to show the process of uploading. - When you need to upload files by dragging and dropping. ## Examples Upload by clicking Avatar Default Files Pictures Wall Pictures with picture-circle type Complete control over file list Drag and Drop Upload directory Upload manually Upload png file only Pictures with list style Customize preview file Max Count Transform file before request Aliyun OSS custom show icon custom action icon Drag sorting of uploadList Crop image before uploading Customize Progress Bar ## API | Property | Description | Type | Default | Version | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | accept | File types that can be accepted. See [input accept Attribute](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/input/file#accept) | string | - | | | action | Uploading URL | string \| (file) => Promise<string> | - | | | beforeUpload | Hook function which will be executed before uploading. Uploading will be stopped with `false` or a rejected Promise returned. When returned value is `Upload.LIST_IGNORE`, the list of files that have been uploaded will ignore it. **Warning：this function is not supported in IE9** | (file, fileList) => boolean \| Promise<File> \| `Upload.LIST_IGNORE` | - | | | customRequest | Override for the default xhr behavior allowing for additional customization and ability to implement your own XMLHttpRequest | function | - | | | data | Uploading extra params or function which can return uploading extra params | object \| (file) => object \| Promise<object> | - | | | defaultFileList | Default list of files that have been uploaded | object\[] | - | | | directory | Support upload whole directory ([caniuse](https://caniuse.com/#feat=input-file-directory)) | boolean | false | | | disabled | Disable upload button | boolean | false | | | fileList | List of files that have been uploaded (controlled). Here is a common issue [#2423](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/issues/2423) when using it | [UploadFile](#uploadfile)\[] | - | | | headers | Set request headers, valid above IE10 | object | - | | | iconRender | Custom show icon | (file: UploadFile, listType?: UploadListType) => ReactNode | - | | | isImageUrl | Customize if render <img /> in thumbnail | (file: UploadFile) => boolean | [(inside implementation)](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/blob/4ad5830eecfb87471cd8ac588c5d992862b70770/components/upload/utils.tsx#L47-L68) | | | itemRender | Custom item of uploadList | (originNode: ReactElement, file: UploadFile, fileList: object\[], actions: { download: function, preview: function, remove: function }) => React.ReactNode | - | 4.16.0 | | listType | Built-in stylesheets, support for four types: `text`, `picture`, `picture-card` or `picture-circle` | string | `text` | `picture-circle`(5.2.0+) | | maxCount | Limit the number of uploaded files. Will replace current one when `maxCount` is `1` | number | - | 4.10.0 | | method | The http method of upload request | string | `post` | | | multiple | Whether to support selected multiple file. `IE10+` supported. You can select multiple files with CTRL holding down while multiple is set to be true | boolean | false | | | name | The name of uploading file | string | `file` | | | openFileDialogOnClick | Click open file dialog | boolean | true | | | previewFile | Customize preview file logic | (file: File \| Blob) => Promise<dataURL: string> | - | | | progress | Custom progress bar | [ProgressProps](/components/progress/#api) (support `type="line"` only) | { strokeWidth: 2, showInfo: false } | 4.3.0 | | showUploadList | Whether to show default upload list, could be an object to specify `showPreviewIcon`, `showRemoveIcon`, `showDownloadIcon`, `removeIcon` and `downloadIcon` individually | boolean \| { showPreviewIcon?: boolean, showDownloadIcon?: boolean, showRemoveIcon?: boolean, previewIcon?: ReactNode \| (file: UploadFile) => ReactNode, removeIcon?: ReactNode \| (file: UploadFile) => ReactNode, downloadIcon?: ReactNode \| (file: UploadFile) => ReactNode } | true | function: 4.7.0 | | withCredentials | The ajax upload with cookie sent | boolean | false | | | onChange | A callback function, can be executed when uploading state is changing, see [onChange](#onchange) | function | - | | | onDrop | A callback function executed when files are dragged and dropped into upload area | (event: React.DragEvent) => void | - | 4.16.0 | | onDownload | Click the method to download the file, pass the method to perform the method logic, do not pass the default jump to the new TAB | function(file): void | (Jump to new TAB) | | | onPreview | A callback function, will be executed when file link or preview icon is clicked | function(file) | - | | | onRemove | A callback function, will be executed when removing file button is clicked, remove event will be prevented when return value is false or a Promise which resolve(false) or reject | function(file): boolean \| Promise | - | | ### UploadFile Extends File with additional props. | Property | Description | Type | Default | Version | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | crossOrigin | CORS settings attributes | `'anonymous'` \| `'use-credentials'` \| `''` | - | 4.20.0 | | name | File name | string | - | - | | percent | Upload progress percent | number | - | - | | status | Upload status. Show different style when configured | `error` \| `success` \| `done` \| `uploading` \| `removed` | - | - | | thumbUrl | Thumb image url | string | - | - | | uid | unique id. Will auto generate when not provided | string | - | - | | url | Download url | string | - | - | ### onChange > The function will be called when uploading is in progress, completed or failed. When uploading state change, it returns: ```js { file: { /* ... */ }, fileList: [ /* ... */ ], event: { /* ... */ }, } ``` 1. `file` File object for the current operation. ```js { uid: 'uid', // unique identifier, negative is recommend, to prevent interference with internal generated id name: 'xx.png', // file name status: 'done', // options：uploading, done, error, removed. Intercepted file by beforeUpload don't have status field. response: '{"status": "success"}', // response from server linkProps: '{"download": "image"}', // additional html props of file link xhr: 'XMLHttpRequest{ ... }', // XMLHttpRequest Header } ``` 2. `fileList` current list of files 3. `event` response from server, including uploading progress, supported by advanced browsers. ## FAQ ### How do I implement upload server side? - You can consult [jQuery-File-Upload](https://github.com/blueimp/jQuery-File-Upload/wiki#server-side) about how to implement server side upload interface. - There is a mock example of [express](https://github.com/react-component/upload/blob/master/server.js) in rc-upload. ### I want to display download links. Please set property `url` of each item in `fileList` to control content of link. ### How to use `customRequest`? See . ### Why will the `fileList` that's in control not trigger `onChange` `status` update when the file is not in the list? `onChange` will only trigger when the file is in the list, it will ignore any events removed from the list. Please note that there does exist a bug which makes an event still trigger even when the file is not in the list before `4.13.0`. ### Why does `onChange` sometimes return File object and other times return { originFileObj: File }? For compatible case, we return File object when `beforeUpload` return `false`. It will merge to `{ originFileObj: File }` in next major version. Current version is compatible to get origin file by `info.file.originFileObj`. You can change this before major release. ### Why sometime Chrome can not upload? Chrome update will also break native upload. Please restart chrome to finish the upload work. Ref: - [#32672](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/issues/32672) - [#32913](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/issues/32913) - [#33988](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/issues/33988)
components.docZh: 文件选择上传和拖拽上传控件。 ## 何时使用 上传是将信息（网页、文字、图片、视频等）通过网页或者上传工具发布到远程服务器上的过程。 - 当需要上传一个或一些文件时。 - 当需要展现上传的进度时。 - 当需要使用拖拽交互时。 ## 代码演示 点击上传 用户头像 已上传的文件列表 照片墙 圆形照片墙 完全控制的上传列表 拖拽上传 文件夹上传 手动上传 只上传 png 图片 图片列表样式 自定义预览 限制数量 上传前转换文件 阿里云 OSS 自定义显示 icon 自定义交互图标 上传列表拖拽排序 上传前裁切图片 自定义进度条样式 ## API | 参数 | 说明 | 类型 | 默认值 | 版本 | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | accept | 接受上传的文件类型, 详见 [input accept Attribute](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/input/file#accept) | string | - | | | action | 上传的地址 | string \| (file) => Promise<string> | - | | | beforeUpload | 上传文件之前的钩子，参数为上传的文件，若返回 `false` 则停止上传。支持返回一个 Promise 对象，Promise 对象 reject 时则停止上传，resolve 时开始上传（ resolve 传入 `File` 或 `Blob` 对象则上传 resolve 传入对象）；也可以返回 `Upload.LIST_IGNORE`，此时列表中将不展示此文件。 **注意：IE9 不支持该方法** | (file, fileList) => boolean \| Promise<File> \| `Upload.LIST_IGNORE` | - | | | customRequest | 通过覆盖默认的上传行为，可以自定义自己的上传实现 | function | - | | | data | 上传所需额外参数或返回上传额外参数的方法 | object\|(file) => object \| Promise<object> | - | | | defaultFileList | 默认已经上传的文件列表 | object\[] | - | | | directory | 支持上传文件夹（[caniuse](https://caniuse.com/#feat=input-file-directory)） | boolean | false | | | disabled | 是否禁用 | boolean | false | | | fileList | 已经上传的文件列表（受控），使用此参数时，如果遇到 `onChange` 只调用一次的问题，请参考 [#2423](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/issues/2423) | [UploadFile](#uploadfile)\[] | - | | | headers | 设置上传的请求头部，IE10 以上有效 | object | - | | | iconRender | 自定义显示 icon | (file: UploadFile, listType?: UploadListType) => ReactNode | - | | | isImageUrl | 自定义缩略图是否使用 <img /> 标签进行显示 | (file: UploadFile) => boolean | [(内部实现)](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/blob/4ad5830eecfb87471cd8ac588c5d992862b70770/components/upload/utils.tsx#L47-L68) | | | itemRender | 自定义上传列表项 | (originNode: ReactElement, file: UploadFile, fileList: object\[], actions: { download: function, preview: function, remove: function }) => React.ReactNode | - | 4.16.0 | | listType | 上传列表的内建样式，支持四种基本样式 `text`, `picture`, `picture-card` 和 `picture-circle` | string | `text` | `picture-circle`(5.2.0+) | | maxCount | 限制上传数量。当为 1 时，始终用最新上传的文件代替当前文件 | number | - | 4.10.0 | | method | 上传请求的 http method | string | `post` | | | multiple | 是否支持多选文件，`ie10+` 支持。开启后按住 ctrl 可选择多个文件 | boolean | false | | | name | 发到后台的文件参数名 | string | `file` | | | openFileDialogOnClick | 点击打开文件对话框 | boolean | true | | | previewFile | 自定义文件预览逻辑 | (file: File \| Blob) => Promise<dataURL: string> | - | | | progress | 自定义进度条样式 | [ProgressProps](/components/progress-cn#api)（仅支持 `type="line"`） | { strokeWidth: 2, showInfo: false } | 4.3.0 | | showUploadList | 是否展示文件列表, 可设为一个对象，用于单独设定 `showPreviewIcon`, `showRemoveIcon`, `showDownloadIcon`, `removeIcon` 和 `downloadIcon` | boolean \| { showPreviewIcon?: boolean, showRemoveIcon?: boolean, showDownloadIcon?: boolean, previewIcon?: ReactNode \| (file: UploadFile) => ReactNode, removeIcon?: ReactNode \| (file: UploadFile) => ReactNode, downloadIcon?: ReactNode \| (file: UploadFile) => ReactNode } | true | function: 4.7.0 | | withCredentials | 上传请求时是否携带 cookie | boolean | false | | | onChange | 上传文件改变时的回调，详见 [onChange](#onchange) | function | - | | | onDrop | 当文件被拖入上传区域时执行的回调功能 | (event: React.DragEvent) => void | - | 4.16.0 | | onDownload | 点击下载文件时的回调，如果没有指定，则默认跳转到文件 url 对应的标签页 | function(file): void | (跳转新标签页) | | | onPreview | 点击文件链接或预览图标时的回调 | function(file) | - | | | onRemove   | 点击移除文件时的回调，返回值为 false 时不移除。支持返回一个 Promise 对象，Promise 对象 resolve(false) 或 reject 时不移除               | function(file): boolean \| Promise | -   | | ### UploadFile 继承自 File，附带额外属性用于渲染。 | 参数 | 说明 | 类型 | 默认值 | 版本 | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | crossOrigin | CORS 属性设置 | `'anonymous'` \| `'use-credentials'` \| `''` | - | 4.20.0 | | name | 文件名 | string | - | - | | percent | 上传进度 | number | - | - | | status | 上传状态，不同状态展示颜色也会有所不同 | `error` \| `success` \| `done` \| `uploading` \| `removed` | - | - | | thumbUrl | 缩略图地址 | string | - | - | | uid | 唯一标识符，不设置时会自动生成 | string | - | - | | url | 下载地址 | string | - | - | ### onChange > 上传中、完成、失败都会调用这个函数。 文件状态改变的回调，返回为： ```js { file: { /* ... */ }, fileList: [ /* ... */ ], event: { /* ... */ }, } ``` 1. `file` 当前操作的文件对象。 ```js { uid: 'uid', // 文件唯一标识，建议设置为负数，防止和内部产生的 id 冲突 name: 'xx.png', // 文件名 status: 'done', // 状态有：uploading done error removed，被 beforeUpload 拦截的文件没有 status 属性 response: '{"status": "success"}', // 服务端响应内容 linkProps: '{"download": "image"}', // 下载链接额外的 HTML 属性 } ``` 2. `fileList` 当前的文件列表。 3. `event` 上传中的服务端响应内容，包含了上传进度等信息，高级浏览器支持。 ## FAQ ### 服务端如何实现？ - 服务端上传接口实现可以参考 [jQuery-File-Upload](https://github.com/blueimp/jQuery-File-Upload/wiki#server-side)。 - 如果要做本地 mock 可以参考这个 [express 的例子](https://github.com/react-component/upload/blob/master/server.js)。 ### 如何显示下载链接？ 请使用 fileList 属性设置数组项的 url 属性进行展示控制。 ### `customRequest` 怎么使用？ 请参考 。 ### 为何 `fileList` 受控时，上传不在列表中的文件不会触发 `onChange` 后续的 `status` 更新事件？ `onChange` 事件仅会作用于在列表中的文件，因而 `fileList` 不存在对应文件时后续事件会被忽略。请注意，在 `4.13.0` 版本之前受控状态存在 bug 导致不在列表中的文件也会触发。 ### `onChange` 为什么有时候返回 File 有时候返回 { originFileObj: File }？ 历史原因，在 `beforeUpload` 返回 `false` 时，会返回 File 对象。在下个大版本我们会统一返回 `{ originFileObj: File }` 对象。当前版本已经兼容所有场景下 `info.file.originFileObj` 获取原 File 写法。你可以提前切换。 ### 为何有时 Chrome 点击 Upload 无法弹出文件选择框？ 与 antd 无关，原生上传也会失败。请重启 Chrome 浏览器，让其完成升级工作。相关 issue： - [#32672](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/issues/32672) - [#32913](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/issues/32913) - [#33988](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/issues/33988)

components.name: Watermark
components.whenToUse:
- Use when the page needs to be watermarked to identify the copyright.
- Suitable for preventing information theft.
components.whenToUseZh:
- 页面需要添加水印标识版权时使用。
- 适用于防止信息盗用。

props.name: width
props.description: The width of the watermark, the default value of `content` is its own width
props.descriptionZh: 水印的宽度，`content` 的默认值为自身的宽度

props.name: height
props.description: The height of the watermark, the default value of `content` is its own height
props.descriptionZh: 水印的高度，`content` 的默认值为自身的高度

props.name: rotate
props.description: When the watermark is drawn, the rotation Angle, unit `°`
props.descriptionZh: 水印绘制时，旋转的角度，单位 `°`

props.name: zIndex
props.description: The z-index of the appended watermark element
props.descriptionZh: 追加的水印元素的 z-index

props.name: image
props.description: Image source, it is recommended to export 2x or 3x image, high priority (support base64 format)
props.descriptionZh: 图片源，建议导出 2 倍或 3 倍图，优先级高 (支持 base64 格式)

props.name: offset
props.description: The offset of the watermark from the upper left corner of the container. The default is `gap/2`
props.descriptionZh: 水印距离容器左上角的偏移量，默认为 `gap/2`

demos.name: basic
demos.title: Basic
demos.description: The most basic usage.
demos.descriptionZh: 最简单的用法。

demos.name: custom
demos.title: Custom configuration
demos.description: Preview the watermark effect by configuring custom parameters.
demos.descriptionZh: 通过自定义参数配置预览水印效果。

demos.name: image
demos.title: Image watermark
demos.description: Specify the image address via 'image'. To ensure that the image is high definition and not stretched, set the width and height, and upload at least twice the width and height of the logo image address.
demos.descriptionZh: 通过 `image` 指定图片地址。为保证图片高清且不被拉伸，请设置 width 和 height, 并上传至少两倍的宽高的 logo 图片地址。

demos.name: multi-line
demos.title: Multi-line watermark
demos.description: Use 'content' to set a string array to specify multi-line text watermark content.
demos.descriptionZh: 通过 `content` 设置 字符串数组 指定多行文字水印内容。

faq.question: Handle abnormal image watermarks
faq.answer:
When using an image watermark and the image loads abnormally, you can add `content` at the same time to prevent the watermark from becoming invalid (since 5.2.3).

```typescript jsx
<Watermark
  height={30}
  width={130}
  content="Ant Design"
  image="https://mdn.alipayobjects.com/huamei_7uahnr/afts/img/A*lkAoRbywo0oAAAAAAAAAAAAADrJ8AQ/original"
>
  <div style={{ height: 500 }} />
</Watermark>
```

components.doc:
Add specific text or patterns to the page. ## When To Use - Use when the page needs to be watermarked to identify the copyright. - Suitable for preventing information theft. ## Examples Basic Multi-line watermark Image watermark Custom configuration ## API ### Watermark | Property | Description | Type | Default | Version | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | width | The width of the watermark, the default value of `content` is its own width | number | 120 | | | height | The height of the watermark, the default value of `content` is its own height | number | 64 | | | rotate | When the watermark is drawn, the rotation Angle, unit `°` | number | -22 | | | zIndex | The z-index of the appended watermark element | number | 9 | | | image | Image source, it is recommended to export 2x or 3x image, high priority (support base64 format) | string | - | | | content | Watermark text content | string \| string[] | - | | | font | Text style | [Font](#font) | [Font](#font) | | | gap | The spacing between watermarks | \[number, number\] | \[100, 100\] | | | offset | The offset of the watermark from the upper left corner of the container. The default is `gap/2` | \[number, number\] | \[gap\[0\]/2, gap\[1\]/2\] | | ### Font | Property | Description | Type | Default | Version | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | color | font color | string | rgba(0,0,0,.15) | | | fontSize | font size | number | 16 | | | fontWeight | font weight | `normal` \| `light` \| `weight` \| number | normal | | | fontFamily | font family | string | sans-serif | | | fontStyle | font style | `none` \| `normal` \| `italic` \| `oblique` | normal | | ## FAQ ### Handle abnormal image watermarks When using an image watermark and the image loads abnormally, you can add `content` at the same time to prevent the watermark from becoming invalid (since 5.2.3). ```typescript jsx
```
components.docZh:
给页面的某个区域加上水印。 ## 何时使用 - 页面需要添加水印标识版权时使用。 - 适用于防止信息盗用。 ## 代码演示 基本 多行水印 图片水印 自定义配置 ## API ### Watermark | 参数 | 说明 | 类型 | 默认值 | 版本 | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | width | 水印的宽度，`content` 的默认值为自身的宽度 | number | 120 | | | height | 水印的高度，`content` 的默认值为自身的高度 | number | 64 | | | rotate | 水印绘制时，旋转的角度，单位 `°` | number | -22 | | | zIndex | 追加的水印元素的 z-index | number | 9 | | | image | 图片源，建议导出 2 倍或 3 倍图，优先级高 (支持 base64 格式) | string | - | | | content | 水印文字内容 | string \| string[] | - | | | font | 文字样式 | [Font](#font) | [Font](#font) | | | gap | 水印之间的间距 | \[number, number\] | \[100, 100\] | | | offset | 水印距离容器左上角的偏移量，默认为 `gap/2` | \[number, number\] | \[gap\[0\]/2, gap\[1\]/2\] | | ### Font | 参数 | 说明 | 类型 | 默认值 | 版本 | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | color | 字体颜色 | string | rgba(0,0,0,.15) | | | fontSize | 字体大小 | number | 16 | | | fontWeight | 字体粗细 | `normal` \| `light` \| `weight` \| number | normal | | | fontFamily | 字体类型 | string | sans-serif | | | fontStyle | 字体样式 | `none` \| `normal` \| `italic` \| `oblique` | normal | | ## FAQ ### 处理异常图片水印 当使用图片水印且图片加载异常时，可以同时添加 `content` 防止水印失效（自 5.2.3 开始支持）。 ```typescript jsx
```

globalTokens.description: The darkest fill color is used to distinguish between the second and third level of fill color, and is currently only used in the hover effect of Slider.

globalTokens.descriptionZh: 最弱一级的填充色，适用于不易引起注意的色块，例如斑马纹、区分边界的色块等。

globalTokens.description: The second level of fill color can outline the shape of the element more clearly, such as Rate, Skeleton, etc. It can also be used as the Hover state of the third level of fill color, such as Table, etc.
globalTokens.descriptionZh: 二级填充色可以较为明显地勾勒出元素形体，如 Rate、Skeleton 等。也可以作为三级填充色的 Hover 状态，如 Table 等。

globalTokens.description: The third level of fill color is used to outline the shape of the element, such as Slider, Segmented, etc. If there is no emphasis requirement, it is recommended to use the third level of fill color as the default fill color.
globalTokens.descriptionZh: 三级填充色用于勾勒出元素形体的场景，如 Slider、Segmented 等。如无强调需求的情况下，建议使用三级填色作为默认填色。

changes.description: - 🐞 Fix Menu `items` not accept `key` issue. [](https://github.com/Yuiai01)
- 🐞 Fix submenu themes being overwritten when using `getPopupContainer` to select the main Menu. [](https://github.com/Yuiai01)
🐞 Fix Table filter do not persist filter status when filter dropdown is visible. [](https://github.com/ablakey)
🐞 Fix Modal using `useModal` is not transparent and prefers user settings. [](https://github.com/luo3house)
- 🐞 Fix the problem that the Form validation state does not change in sequence. [-tang](https://github.com/kiner-tang)
- 💄 Fix Form component layout exceptions when set props `layout="inline"`. [](https://github.com/itkui)
💄 Fix ConfigProvider `nonce` not working on CSS-in-JS style.
💄 Fix Pagination when `size=small`, pagination button active, previous page next page button hover and active styles are lost.
💄 Fix the style problem that the bottom border of the Tabs component overlaps with other borders.
💄 Fix Dropdown.Button down icon size issue.
- 🐞 Fix the incorrect type definition of Breadcrumb.Item `menu`.
- 🤖 Optimize Grid Col type. [](https://github.com/vaakian)
- 🤖 Optimize Table `resetPagination` type.
- 🤖 Optimize TreeSelect `InternalTreeSelect` type. [](https://github.com/Andarist)
- 💄 Fix Anchor redundant border style when it is set to horizontal direction. [](https://github.com/gooyoung)
- 💄 Fix Anchor ink square style in `vertical` mode. [](https://github.com/acyza)
🐞 Fix Grid `offset` can not be overwritten problem under different device screen sizes. [](https://github.com/Yuiai01)
🐞 Fix Breadcrumb `onClick` not working bug. [](https://github.com/acyza)
🐞 Fix Upload trigger Progress warning after upload. [-tang](https://github.com/kiner-tang)
🐞 Fix Table unexpected layout problem when dragging element to the right. [](https://github.com/hoho2017)
💄 Fix Tabs more icon color in dark mode. [](https://github.com/PhosphorusP)
💄 Fix Button focus outline style be covered by Dropdown.Button. [](https://github.com/Yuiai01)
💄 Fix Input.TextArea style problem when focusing. [](https://github.com/MuxinFeng)
- 💄 Fix Input.TextArea RTL style when enable `showCount`. [](https://github.com/ds1371dani)
- 🤖 Export `CountdownProps` for Statistic. [-jia-nan](https://github.com/li-jia-nan)
- 🤖 Improve most alias token meta info. [](https://github.com/arvinxx)
- 🤖 Improve Badge `React.forwardRef` type definition. [-jia-nan](https://github.com/li-jia-nan)
🐞 Update DatePicker deps to fix laggy in Safari and support align with `transform scale`.
🐞 Fix Menu collapse, Tooltip sometime show with unexpected.
🐞 Fix Modal.confirm has additional node which makes height not correct. [](https://github.com/Svudec)
🐞 Fixed InputNumber `disabled` text color not correct. [](https://github.com/Yuiai01)
🐞 Fix Anchor highlighting not working when dynamically updating `items`. [](https://github.com/zqran)
🛠 Update Mentions deps to support align with `transform scale`. [](https://github.com/MuxinFeng)
🐞 Fix Form with manually called `validateFields` not show success status when `hasFeedback` is on. [-tang](https://github.com/kiner-tang)
🐞 Fix Cascader sub panel not close when hover to leaf node.
🐞 Fix Popconfirm using `Promise` to close will not exist `loading` state even when open again.
🐞 Fix Upload `onChange` sometime not sync when in React 18. [-jia-nan](https://github.com/li-jia-nan)
🌐 Update ko_KR、Added Amharic Language. [-jia-nan](https://github.com/li-jia-nan)
🆕 Tooltip support `arrow.pointAtCenter` and deprecate `arrow.arrowPointAtCenter`. [](https://github.com/MadCcc)
🆕 Progress support custom `size`. [-tang](https://github.com/kiner-tang)
🆕 Tour support custom `zIndex`. [-tang](https://github.com/kiner-tang)
🆕 Table `onHeaderCell` support customize `colSpan` and `rowSpan`.
🆕 Image.Group support `onChange` callback. [-tang](https://github.com/kiner-tang)
- 🆕 App support `style` props. [-jia-nan](https://github.com/li-jia-nan)
- 🆕 App support `message` and `notification` options. [](https://github.com/luo3house)
🆕 ConfigProvider support `useConfig` hook to get `size` and `disabled` in context. [](https://github.com/xliez)
🆕 Breadcrumb support `items` prop. [](https://github.com/heiyu4585)
🛠 Breadcrumb separators are unified into `li` elements. [](https://github.com/heiyu4585)
🛠 Tooltip support auto arrow position & adjust position if possible. `destroyTooltipOnHide.keepParent` is deprecated since it will be always auto destroy unnecessary container now.
🛠 Rename preset colors in token, .e.g `blue-1` to `blue1`, and deprecate tokens before.
💄 Message use `colorText` in style. [](https://github.com/Yuiai01)
💄 Fix Select, TreeSelect, Cascader popup align position not correct when parent has `transform: scale` style.
💄 Optimize `rowScope` style for Table. [](https://github.com/Yuiai01)
💄 Provide new AliasToken `lineWidthFocus` for `outline-width` of focused component. [](https://github.com/MadCcc)
💄 WeekPicker support hover style.
💄 Adjust Select, TreeSelect, Cascader always show the `arrow` by default when multiple.
🐞 Fix Form `Form.Item.useStatus` problem with sever-side-rendering. [](https://github.com/AndyBoat)
🐞 Fix arrow shape in some components. [](https://github.com/MadCcc)
🐞 Fix Layout throw `React does not recognize the `suffixCls` prop on a DOM element` warning.
🐞 Fix Watermark that text will be displayed when the picture loads abnormally. [](https://github.com/OriginRing)
🐞 Image support flip function in preview mode. Fix Image `fallback` when used in ssr.
🐞 Fix Typography component is not centered in the Select component. [](https://github.com/Yuiai01)
🌐 Update locale `vi_VN` adding Vietnamese translation for Form component validation. [](https://github.com/lamvananh)
- 💄 FloatButton support `rtl` mode. [-jia-nan](https://github.com/li-jia-nan)
- 🤖 Fix Cascader that generics should not be necessary. [](https://github.com/crazyair)
🐞 Fix for setting `percent` and `success.percent` at the same time for `Progress`, the progress text does not change as `percent` changes.
🐞 Fixed Image preview icon was misaligned.
🐞 Fix ConfigProvider validation message template override Form configure template sometime. [](https://github.com/Wxh16144)
🐞 Fixed Confirm Modal `onOk` event could be triggered twice when close. [-Martins](https://github.com/Rafael-Martins)
🛠 Rewrote the `useLocale` method and exposed `localeCode` to the public. [-jia-nan](https://github.com/li-jia-nan)
🐞 Fixed Segmented component items were unresponsive to mouse events. [](https://github.com/MadCcc)
🛠 Refactored: replaced the LocaleReceiver component with `useLocale` and removed the LocaleReceiver component. [-jia-nan](https://github.com/li-jia-nan)
🐞 Fixed `getPopupContainer` property injected by ConfigProvider did not work. [](https://github.com/RedJue)
🐞 Fixed where Descriptions did not accept `data-_` and `aria-_` attributes. [](https://github.com/goveo)
🛠 Changed the Separator's DOM element from `span` to `li`. [](https://github.com/heiyu4585)
🐞 Fix token of `Layout.colorBgHeader` not work when single use Layout.Header directly.
💄 Changed the component's focus `outline` to the default `4px`. [](https://github.com/MadCcc)
🐞 Fixed the Badge color was displayed abnormally. [-tang](https://github.com/kiner-tang)
🐞 Fixed an issue with the Timeline item's `className`. [](https://github.com/Yuiai01)
💄 Fixed the interaction style of the Rate component in the disabled state. [](https://github.com/Yuiai01)
- 💄 Optimize DatePicker date panel style.
- 🐞 Fix RangePicker hover style on wrong date. [](https://github.com/Yuiai01)
- 🐞 Fixed inconsistency between Checkbox and Radio in table when Form is `disabled`. [](https://github.com/Yuiai01)
- 🐞 Fix Radio/Checkbox under Form `disabled` property don't works correctly. [](https://github.com/Yuiai01)
🐞 Fix List extra padding when enable `grid` property.
🐞 Fix Upload actions icon alignment issue.
💄 Tweak Table filter dropdown radius style.
🐞 Fix Button `loading.delay` not delay at first time. [](https://github.com/RedJue)
🐞 Fix Input status style when using `addonAfter` and `addonBefore`. [-cn](https://github.com/carla-cn)
🐞 Fix Skeleton `active` flicky animation in Safari. [](https://github.com/slotDumpling)
🛠 Rewrite `panelRender` in Tour to function component。 [-jia-nan](https://github.com/li-jia-nan)
🐞 Fix `className` property wrongly passed to child nodes in TimeLine。 [](https://github.com/any1024)
🐞 Fix Slider dot to trigger click and hover correctly. [](https://github.com/LongHaoo)
🐞 Fix Tour that should support `0` as element. [-jia-nan](https://github.com/li-jia-nan)
💄 Fix DataPicker.RangePicker hover range style. [](https://github.com/Yuiai01)
💄 Optimize Steps custom `icon` size. [](https://github.com/MadCcc)
- 🤖 Update Upload to support generic types. [](https://github.com/riyadelberkawy)
🌐 Localization
🆕 Tooltip support `arrow` to change arrow's visible state and whether the arrow is pointed at the center of target. [-tang](https://github.com/kiner-tang)
🆕 Added list pagination `align` option. [](https://github.com/Yuiai01)
🆕 Timeline added `items` to support option configuration.
- 🆕 Collapse supports setting `size`. [](https://github.com/Yuiai01)
- 🆕 Add ref for Collapse and Panel. [](https://github.com/any1024)
- 🆕 Slider add `railStyle` for custom style. [-cord](https://github.com/david-cord)
- 🆕 Slider add support for disable `keyboard` events.
- 🐞 Fix Slider missing Tooltip appear motion.
- 🆕 Dropdown support `autoAdjustOverflow` option.
- 💄 Fix Dropdown component `danger` and `disabled` style priority issue. [](https://github.com/Wxh16144)
- 🆕 Tour added `indicatorsRender` to support custom indicators.
- 🆕 Tour support `scrollIntoViewOptions` to change scrollIntoView options. [-tang](https://github.com/kiner-tang)
- 🆕 Tour masks support passing custom styles and fill colors. [-tang](https://github.com/kiner-tang)
- 🐞 Fixed `findDomNode` method warning thrown by the tour component when called in strict mode. [-tang](https://github.com/kiner-tang)
- 💄 Deleted margin of the last indicator.
🆕 Adds Design token `fontFamilyCode` and apply to Typography `code` `kbd` `pre` elements.
🆕 ConfigProvider add Form `scrollToFirstError`。 [](https://github.com/linxianxi)
🐞 Fill rest `rootClassName` for all components.
🐞 Fix Empty descriptions text color in default theme and dark theme. [](https://github.com/MuxinFeng)
- 🐞 Fix `aria-label` and `role="presentation"` cannot be used together in Table row. [](https://github.com/Ke1sy)
- 🐞 Fix uncontrolled `filtered` update not working.
- 🐞 Fix the problem that the header filter is invalid in the case of group headers. [](https://github.com/roman40a)
- 🐞 Fix selection column cover by other cell when fixed. [-tang](https://github.com/kiner-tang)
- 🐞 Fix Sorted/Filtered table fixed column transparent background unreadable. [-tang](https://github.com/kiner-tang)
- 💄 Optimize Table hover style to fix problems with border.
- 🐞 Fix DatePicker that have status style when disabled.
- 💄 Optimize the DatePicker input box style. [](https://github.com/Wxh16144)
- 💄 Optimize DatePicker Dropdown arrow style.
🐞 Fix Space `ant-space-item` selector bug. [](https://github.com/cncolder)
🐞 Fix not close Spin immediately when using `delay`. [](https://github.com/3Alan)
🐞 Fix Modal `useModal` default confirm button text logic. [](https://github.com/BoyYangzai)
🛠 Refactored the water ripple visual effect to trigger multiple water ripples at the same time. [-jia-nan](https://github.com/li-jia-nan)
🛠 Refactor Input.TextArea and Mentions.
🛠 Refactor Affix Calendar to use React.createRef instead of function. [-jia-nan](https://github.com/li-jia-nan)
💄 Fix Tabs more button unexpected height.
💄 Resolve Image preview style conflict with TailwindCSS.
💄 Fix Progress that `transition` of success bar is missing.
💄 Fix the misalignment of Input.Group when zooming the screen under windows. [](https://github.com/heiyu4585)
💄 Fix Select placeholder style issue. [](https://github.com/Wxh16144)
💄 Adjust Descriptions label style for more readable.
💄 Optimize QRCode expiration display style.
💄 Optimize `boxShadow` tokens.
- 🤖 Optimize Badge Tag Tooltip `color` type definition.
- 🤖 Add `Breakpoint` `ThmeConfig` `GlobalToken` type export. [](https://github.com/Kamahl19)
- 🤖 Update Upload `fileList` type.
- 🤖 Remove Tour ForwardRefRenderFunction.
🌐 Localization

💄 New Design
- 💄 Change primary color to `#1677ff`.
- 💄 Change basic border radius to `6px`, and support gradient radius.
- 💄 Optimize transition duration.
- 💄 Optimize padding and remove border for some components.
- 💄 Pagination remove border.
- 💄 Optimize Timeline style.
- 💄 Optimize Steps style.
- 💄 Optimize focus style for some components.
- 💄 Optimize style with large border radius.
- 💄 Optimize Table hover style.
- 💄 Optimize Segmented hover style.
- 💄 Optimize Dropdown hover style.
- 💄 Optimize close button style for some components like Modal.
- 💄 Optimize Menu style.
- 💄 Optimize hover style for some more components.
- 💄 Optimize Switch transition.
- 💄 Optimize Anchor ink ball style.
🆕 Export object `theme` which contains hooks and algorithms related with theme.
- 🆕 Add `theme.useToken` hook to get Design Token in context.
- 🆕 Preset algorithm
- 🆕 Default algorithm `theme.defaultAlgorithm`.
- 🆕 Dark algorithm `theme.darkAlgorithm`.
- 🆕 Compact algorithm `theme.compactAlgorithm`.
🆕 ConfigProvider support `theme` prop to modify theme configuration. For more: [Customize Theme](https://ant.design/docs/react/customize-theme).
- 🆕 Support multiple `algorithm` pipeline.
- 🆕 Support switching wireframe style.
- 🆕 Support override Design Token for single component.
🆕 Add `locale` directory in package, which contains commonjs locale files. [](https://github.com/chunsch)
🗑 Do not support IE browser anymore.
🗑 Remove package `antd/lib`.
- 🛠 Change `main` in `package.json` to `dist/antd.js`. [eb8835f](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/commit/eb8835fe29b39767c0f5e310f5c69619a75d5840)
🗑 Remove `dist/antd.css`, and add `dist/reset.css` to override common styles.
🗑 Deprecate `visible` and provide `open` instead in components below. [](https://github.com/yykoypj)
- 🗑 Tag deprecate `visible`.
- 🗑 Table deprecate `filterDropdownVisible` and provide `filterDropdownOpen`.
- 🗑 Drawer deprecate `visible` and provide `open` instead.
- 🗑 Modal deprecate `visible` and provide `open` instead.
- 🗑 Dropdown deprecate `visible` and provide `open` instead.
- 🗑 Tooltip deprecate `visible` and provide `open` instead, Popover and Popconfirm.
🗑 Deprecate `dropdownClassName` and provide `popupClassName` instead in components below. [](https://github.com/heiyu4585)
- 🗑 AutoComplete deprecate `dropdownClassName` and provide `popupClassName` instead.
- 🗑 Mentions deprecate `dropdownClassName` and provide `popupClassName` instead.
- 🗑 Cascader deprecate `dropdownClassName` and provide `popupClassName` instead.
- 🗑 Select deprecate `dropdownClassName` and provide `popupClassName` instead.
- 🗑 TreeSelect deprecate `dropdownClassName` and provide `popupClassName` instead.
- 🗑 DatePicker and TimePicker deprecate `dropdownClassName` and provide `popupClassName` instead.
🛠 Refactor styles with CSS-in-JS for all components.
- 🗑 Remove less and css in package.

🛠 Change date library from Moment.js to Day.js, for more: [Use custom date library](https://ant.design/docs/react/use-custom-date-library). [b22815d](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/commit/b22815d4d223b80755b472e14d7888beab8dd1da) [](https://github.com/iamkun)
🛠 React Notification to support React 18 concurrent mode and refactor useNotification hook，which is preferred instead of static function.
🛠 Slider props related with Tooltip are unified into `tooltip`. [](https://github.com/yykoypj)
🛠 Migrate official site to [dumi](https://next.d.umijs.org/).
